query:
SELECT id, name, email, role, createdAt
FROM users
WHERE 
  name LIKE '%Teste%' OR 
  name LIKE '%teste%' OR
  name LIKE '%Test%' OR
  name LIKE '%Rank%' OR
  name LIKE '%rank%' OR
  name LIKE '%Batch%' OR
  name LIKE '%batch%' OR
  name LIKE '%Sheets%' OR
  name LIKE '%Duplica%' OR
  name LIKE '%João Silva%' OR
  name LIKE '%Sem nome%' OR
  name LIKE '%Atualizado%' OR
  name = '' OR
  name IS NULL
ORDER BY name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute
